reviews.review_description: Even tho it tracks motion just fine you need to be in a certain position or else the joints will be off , plus it’s a pain importing this into blender correctly as the rest position is all messed up so have fun trying to rig this correctly. This is not worth 30 dollars, I’ve used free mocap programs better than this . Not to mention I didn’t see an option to rename the recorded motion which is real fun when you need to record lots of motion capture
